allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\('token_type:', d.get\('token_type'\)\); print\('expires_in:', d.get\('expires_in'\)\); print\('access_token prefix:', d.get\('access_token',''\)[:40]+'...'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'count={len\(d\)}'\); [print\(u['username'], u['id'][:8]\) for u in d]")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([r['name'] for r in d if not r['name'].startswith\('default-'\) and 'offline' not in r['name']]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('issuer:', d['issuer']\); print\('auth:', d['authorization_endpoint']\); print\('token:', d['token_endpoint']\)" echo "" echo "[container via keycloak:8080]" docker compose exec sso-demo wget -qO- http://keycloak:8080/realms/demo/.well-known/openid-configuration)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('issuer:', d['issuer']\); print\('auth:', d['authorization_endpoint']\); print\('token:', d['token_endpoint']\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d[0] if d else None; print\('clientId:', c['clientId']\); print\('publicClient:', c['publicClient']\); print\('redirectUris:', c['redirectUris']\); print\('enabled:', c['enabled']\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('keycloak/import/realm-export.json'\)\); print\('realm:', d['realm']\); print\('displayName:', d['displayName']\); print\('loginTheme:', d.get\('loginTheme'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('keycloak/import/realm-export.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('realm:', d['realm']\); print\('displayName:', d['displayName']\); print\('loginTheme:', d.get\('loginTheme'\)\); print\('clients:', [c['clientId'] for c in d['clients']]\)")
